subcodes.first_line: Can any soul, through My might and sovereignty, set aside all else but Me and take hold of that which I have ordained in My Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل یقدر احد ان یضع ما سوآئی بقدرتی و سلطانی و یاخذ ما امر به فی کتابی الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment
